leadSummary: 本期重点围绕agent与open-source展开，建议优先关注《aweskills: Let Your AI Agent Manage skills for You》、《Ask HN: Do you give AI agent the specs and have it start building unattended?》、《Vercel AI Gateway Appears to Block BYOK Requests When Account Balance Reaches $0》，并结合现有工程路线评估接入优先级与落地成本。

categoryLeadSummaries.lead: 其他方向本期共 4 条，建议优先阅读《老黄的Token经济学翻车了！微软亚马逊通通跳车》、《清智系企业亮相 BEYOND Expo 2026 并斩获多项大奖》，重点关注其工程可落地性与集成成本。

Agent 方向本期共 2 条，建议优先阅读《aweskills: Let Your AI Agent Manage skills for You》、《Ask HN: Do you give AI agent the specs and have it start building unattended?》，重点关注其工程可落地性与集成成本。

highlights.contentSnippet: Article URL: https://aweskill.webioinfo.top/articles/let-your-ai-agent-manage-aweskill-for-you/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48364549 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
highlights.llmClassifyReason: LLM 分类打分失败，已回退规则结果。

highlights.title: Ask HN: Do you give AI agent the specs and have it start building unattended?
highlights.contentSnippet: I use Cursor and I usually put it in plan mode and feed it the specs so I can review the plan and make sure the implementation will be done the way I want it to or to make sure the plan "feels" right. When I hear or see that people feed the specs, let agents handle things and then do some quick tests to make sure things work as expected, that sounds way too risky. I still have bad experiences where the agents made bad assumptions and included things I didn't need or ask for or had to stop the agent during implementation because it was going down a path that was needlessly complicated. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48364162 Points: 4 # Comments: 1
highlights.llmClassifyReason: LLM 分类打分失败，已回退规则结果。

rankedItems.contentSnippet: Article URL: https://aweskill.webioinfo.top/articles/let-your-ai-agent-manage-aweskill-for-you/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48364549 Points: 1 # Comments: 0

rankedItems.title: Ask HN: Do you give AI agent the specs and have it start building unattended?
rankedItems.contentSnippet: I use Cursor and I usually put it in plan mode and feed it the specs so I can review the plan and make sure the implementation will be done the way I want it to or to make sure the plan "feels" right. When I hear or see that people feed the specs, let agents handle things and then do some quick tests to make sure things work as expected, that sounds way too risky. I still have bad experiences where the agents made bad assumptions and included things I didn't need or ask for or had to stop the agent during implementation because it was going down a path that was needlessly complicated. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48364162 Points: 4 # Comments: 1
